data.title: Nasdaq Down 50 Points; US Initial Jobless Claims Rise
Warren Buffett Says Ignore 'Tarot' Card Predictions by So-Called Experts: 'The Risks of Being Out of the Game Are Huge Compared to Being In'
Synopsys Proposes Divesting Units, Including Ansys PowerArtist, For $35 Billion EU Deal Approval
data.description: $35 billion acquisition by Synopsys of Ansys unit for EU approval, awaiting feedback from rivals and customers by Dec 16.Synopsys plans to divest Ansys unit to win EU approval for $35 billion acquisition, awaiting feedback by Dec 16, also offering to sell Optical Solutions Group and PowerArtist.

data.title: Big Banks Will Get Bigger Under Trump In 2025: Analyst
data.description: Morgan Stanley analyst Betsey Graseck said on Monday that the firm is Overweight on big banks following Donald Trump's win and the Republican sweep of the 2024 election.

data.title: Quantum Computing Innovation: IonQ's Ion Trap On Display At NYSE
data.description: IonQ showcases its ion trap technology at the NYSE, highlighting its leadership in quantum computing and real-world applications.
